response.overview: Everything in a Hollywood studio was running strictly according to a meticulously crafted commercial script—until the unstoppable instincts of world-class footballers took over. Completely tearing up the director's playbook and shattering the rules of the set, elite athletes and internet culture icons stage a chaotic takeover. A high-octane, unpredictable visual feast celebrating the raw, rebellious, and untamable spirit of the beautiful game.
response.tagline: This summer, it's time to Rip The Script!
response.title: Nike - Rip the Script
